seed_instruction: Write a email to your professor to ask for an extention on a project due in two days.
org_constraint: The email must contain exactly 150-200 words.
new_constraint: The email must contain at least 300 words.
instruction: Write a email to your professor to ask for an extention on a project due in two days. The email must contain exactly 150-200 words. The email must contain at least 300 words.
response:
Subject: Urgent Request for Project Extension – [Your Name] – [Course Number]

Dear Professor [Professor's Last Name],

I hope this email finds you well and that you are having a productive week. I am writing to you today with a sincere request regarding the upcoming project due in just two days, which is scheduled for [Date]. While I have been working diligently on this assignment and have already completed the initial research phase and drafted the introduction, I have encountered an unforeseen complication that has significantly impacted my ability to finalize the work by the current deadline.

Specifically, I recently discovered a critical gap in my data analysis that requires additional time to verify and correct. This issue was not apparent during my initial review, and I want to ensure that the final submission is of the highest quality and meets all the rigorous standards expected in this course. Rushing to submit incomplete work would not only be disrespectful of your time but would also reflect poorly on the integrity of my own academic efforts. I am fully committed to learning from this experience and improving my time management skills for future assignments.

Given these circumstances, I would be incredibly grateful if you could consider extending the deadline by two additional days. This would allow me to thoroughly resolve the data issues, conduct a final review, and submit a polished and comprehensive project that truly represents my understanding of the course material. I am prepared to provide any additional documentation or a brief update on my progress if required. I understand that requests for extensions are not always granted, but I sincerely hope you can view my situation with empathy and allow me the opportunity to complete this task properly. Thank you very much for your time, understanding, and continued support throughout this semester. I look forward to your positive response.

Sincerely,

[Your Full Name]  
[Your Student ID Number]  
[Course Name and Number]
